scoringPlays.text: Raheim Sanders 3 Yd Run (Alex Herrera Kick)
Tonka Hemingway 36 Yd Fumble Return (Alex Herrera Kick)
Nick Emmanwori 65 Yd Interception Return (Alex Herrera Kick)
Joshua Simon 33 Yd pass from LaNorris Sellers (Maurice Brown II Run for Two-Point Conversion)
Brenen Thompson 54 Yd pass from Jackson Arnold (Two-Point Pass Conversion Failed)

videos.headline: South Carolina has back-to-back drives with defensive TDs
videos.description: South Carolina's Tonka Hemingway takes off for a 36-yard fumble recovery touchdown, followed by a Nick Emmanwori 65-yard pick-six on the next drive.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (South Carolina has back-to-back drives with defensive TDs) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: South Carolina's Tonka Hemingway sacks QB Jackson Arnold to force a FG
videos.description: Oklahoma quarterback Jackson Arnold is taken down for a sack as South Carolina forces a field goal.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (South Carolina's Tonka Hemingway sacks QB Jackson Arnold to force a FG) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: LaNorris Sellers sails one to Joshua Simon for a Gamecocks TD
videos.description: LaNorris Sellers floats one down the sideline to Joshua Simon for a South Carolina touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (LaNorris Sellers sails one to Joshua Simon for a Gamecocks TD) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jackson Arnold flings 54-yard touchdown for Oklahoma
videos.description: Jackson Arnold hits Brenen Thompson for a 54-yard touchdown to trim Oklahoma's deficit.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Brenen Thompson makes the grab for 54-yard receiving touchdown) 2024/10/19 ESHEET
